data.body: Consideration: [Consumer Impact] discover-agents.sh reads agent-routing.conf, not CLAUDE.md. The CLAUDE.md directive only affects Claude's behavior (prompt-level). Clarify whether discover-agents.sh also needs a local-file fallback path when the marketplace plugin is unavailable, or whether the shim self-detection (story 5d45-de9b) already covers discover-agents.sh's needs via CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT.
